title: brief_decision
description: The brief sanity-check judge's verdict. continue ⇒ the brief has enough signal to proceed to references; clarify ⇒ it needs work, and `questions` lists the specific gaps for the operator to address in the brief on disk.

verdict.description: continue ⇒ proceed to the reference list; clarify ⇒ the operator should revise the brief.

questions.description: Specific clarifying questions when verdict is clarify; empty when continue.
